calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-02-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Almanara Investments, Inc., a/k/a Al Manara Investments, Inc., dba Al Manara Investments.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

David E. Weeks, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.
Melissa Klopstock, Premium Collections Specialist for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Weeks and Ms. Klopstock appeared for this morning's proceedings via CourtCall.
No appearance by defendant Almanara Investments, Inc., a/k/a Al Manara Investments, Inc., dba Al Manara Investments.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Money/Insurance Premiums was filed on February 28, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant Almanara Investments, Inc., a/k/a Al Manara Investments, Inc., dba Al Manara Investments, occurred on March 27, 2018 and was effectuated on April 7, 2018.
Default as to defendant Almanara Investments, Inc., a/k/a Al Manara Investments, Inc., dba Al Manara Investments, was entered on May 30, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 10, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., and against the defaulted defendant Almanara Investments, Inc., a/k/a Al Manara Investments, Inc., dba Al Manara Investments, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $39,431.41. (Amount Pled in Complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - $5,606.82.
Attorney Fees - $1,200.00.
Costs - $529.00.
E-Filing Costs - $74.90

Total - $46,842.13.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
